name: Meta Platforms
headline: Meta Platforms FINAL PRE-EXECUTION CONFIRMATION at 9.4 / Critical (working baseline applied; matches index canonical). 8,000-employee layoff executes May 20 (tomorrow). Internal-protest countdown websites ('Big Beautiful Layoff') and worker-morale collapse documented across multiple sources (CNBC, Variety, NextWeb May 18-19). 6,000 cancelled requisitions bring effective headcount reduction to ~14,000. AI infrastructure spend $115-135B context unchanged. Compound legal liability arc (NM $375M + CA youth-addiction + WhatsApp encryption-breach + 2,400+ active lawsuits) carries forward. No new dimensional weight available pre-execution. May 21 reassessment trigger: actual layoff execution behavior, worker-protest activity, regulatory response.

EMP.rationale: Sustained near floor. Worker-protest countdown websites ('Big Beautiful Layoff'), atmosphere-of-resignation reporting (NextWeb, CNBC) are anchor-1 ('purely transactional') evidence already absorbed.

ACT.rationale: Sustained. Severance package (16wk base + 2wk/yr + 18mo health) above sector floor but applied in context of explicit no-2-way-communication delivery.

ACC.rationale: Floor sustained. Compound legal liability arc (NM $375M, CA youth-addiction, WhatsApp class action, 2,400+ lawsuits) without acknowledgment-prior-to-investigation pathway.

SYS.rationale: Sustained. AI-pivot-displacement-wave sector pattern already incorporated.

INT.rationale: Sustained. I3 internal-consistency: nine-figure executive compensation alongside 8,000-person layoff with compressed pay for the rest is the visible inconsistency, already absorbed.

evidence.finding: Meta layoffs starting May 20 stress harsh AI reality. Employee morale collapsed; internal protests over surveillance software, declining compensation, expectation of further layoffs. Three employee-built countdown websites tracking days until May 20.
Meta cuts 8,000 jobs amid record $56B quarterly revenue. AI-pivot framing concurrent with $115-135B AI infrastructure spend.
Meta laying off 8,000 employees (10% of workforce) amid AI restructuring.

March 2026 NM jury ordered $375M civil penalty; bench trial phase seeking $3.7B abatement plan + mandatory age verification. CA jury negligence finding on youth addiction. WhatsApp encryption-breach class action (April 2026). 2,400+ active lawsuits.

keyEvidence: Worker-protest countdown websites ('Big Beautiful Layoff') documented.
Atmosphere of resignation across affected workforce (CNBC May 18).
Compound legal liability arc (NM $375M + CA youth-addiction + WhatsApp + 2,400+ lawsuits) carries forward.
Nine-figure exec compensation alongside compressed worker pay — I3 inconsistency visible.
rationale: Final pre-execution confirmation at 9.4. Working baseline (9.4) matches index canonical (verified per scanner baseline check). All material evidence for the May 20 event is already absorbed into the dimensional weights. May 21 will be the operative reassessment trigger based on: actual execution behavior, worker-protest activity at scale, regulatory or congressional response, severance-challenge litigation. Math: (1.4+1.1+1.4+1.2+1.6+1+1.7+1.6)/8 = 11/8 = 1.375 → ((1.375-1)/4)*100 = 9.375 → 9.4.
whyHeadline: Meta locks in 9.4 baseline 24 hours before 8,000-worker layoff; countdown-website worker protests documented.

dominantDimension.note: EMP near floor (1.1); worker-protest countdown sites and atmosphere-of-resignation already absorbed. Post-execution evidence may push to floor.

distanceToBoundary.note: Well within Critical band; floor designation possible if next-cycle evidence confirms.

nextForwardSignal.label: Layoff execution + worker-protest activity + regulatory response

watches: May 20 layoff execution: actual count, severance delivery, protest activity
carryForward: Nine-figure exec compensation alongside compressed pay (I3 inconsistency)
Compound legal liability arc (NM, CA, WhatsApp, 2,400+ lawsuits)
boundaryWatchResolution: Not boundary-sensitive. 9.4 sits in central-floor Critical zone. Floor-designation watch is the next-cycle concern.

math_check.validator_check: Math clean. Final pre-execution confirmation; index canonical 9.4 verified.

disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
